title: Replace anchor link text with 'Details' in footer section

requirements.text: In the Footer component, replace the text content of the second anchor link inside the seventh div's second column (XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]) with the word 'Details'.
acceptanceCriteria: The second anchor link in the referenced footer navigation column displays the text 'Details' instead of its previous label.
The link's href and styling remain unchanged.
No other footer links or elements are affected.

constraints: Only change the text content of the specific anchor element identified by the XPath; do not alter its href, class, or any other attribute.
Do not modify any other elements in the footer or elsewhere.
nonGoals: Redesigning or restructuring the footer layout.
Changing any other navigation links or social icons.
